extraction.one_line_summary: ZAKARIN Ilnur attacked solo with 5km remaining on Cevedale/Madritsch climb, capitalizing on LOPEZ mechanical to win and vault into GC contention
tactical_patterns: LANDA Mikel attacked 15km from finish to shed climbers, gaining 1:19 on ROGLIC/NIBALI group despite fading final kilometer
ZAKARIN attacked precisely when gradient steepened with 5km remaining, exploiting LOPEZ wheel-change mechanical moment to solo away
NIBALI Vincenzo marked ROGLIC attacks but refused to chase down ZAKARIN, prioritizing energy conservation over stage hunting
LOPEZ Miguel suffered wheel-change then full bike swap, yet recovered to ROGLIC group showing exceptional crisis management

rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: Won from breakaway attack at 5km, referenced 2017 L'Aquila stage win proving repeated high-altitude finishing power
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Solo attack 15km out gained 1:19 on favorites despite fade, confirming offensive threat on long climbs
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Lost 5+ minutes to stage winner, already described as almost over, abandoned GC ambitions by stage 13
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel: neutral: Double mechanical (wheel then bike) catastrophic but recovered to ROGLIC group, resilience masks lost opportunity
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: Marked attacks but allowed ZAKARIN 2:57 gap, prioritizing NIBALI over Russian 7:45 down pre-stage
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: Solid marking of ROGLIC but passive toward breakaway threats, tactical conservatism on summit finish
